zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Reynell II於1181年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特皮特尼時，他的父親Richard Reynell I31歲，母親Marjorie Walls Allen30歲。他於1201年與Mabel de Esselegh在英國英格蘭薩默塞特皮特尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1259年在他的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特皮特尼。

nameMeanings.name: Reynell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Reynold
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Reinald, Reynaud (ancient Germanic Raginald, from ragin ‘counsel, decision’ + wald ‘rule, ruler’), first introduced to England by Scandinavian settlers in the Old Norse form Rögnvaldr (see Ronald ) and greatly reinforced after the Conquest by the Norman forms Reinald and Reynaud, which often appear Latinized as Reginaldus. The surname was later much confused with Raynor and Renard . The surname is occasionally also borne by Jews, in which case it presumably represents an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Reynell II was born in 1181, in Pitney, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Reynell I, was 31 and his mother, Marjorie Walls Allen, was 30. He married Mabel de Esselegh in 1201, in Pitney, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1259, in his hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in Pitney, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Reynell II est né en 1181, à Pitney, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Reynell I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Marjorie Walls Allen, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mabel d’Esselegh en 1201, à Pitney, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1259, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Pitney, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Reynell II(이)가 1181년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 피트니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Reynell I(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjorie Walls Allen(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1201년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 피트니에서 Mabel de Esselegh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1259년 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 피트니에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Reynell II родился в 1181 г. в местности питни, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Reynell I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Marjorie Walls Allen, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel de Esselegh в 1201 г. в местности питни, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1259 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности питни, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
